title: Privacy policy
seoDescription: Multilingual privacy policy template pending legal review.
intro: This multilingual template exists only as a technical base. It must not be published as final legal copy without legal review.

sections.heading: Data controller
body: Complete this section only with legal details confirmed by the site owner.
Do not insert tax entity names, VAT numbers or registry data unless they have been validated for this new version.

sections.heading: Purposes and legal bases
body: List only real and active purposes in the published version.
Align legal bases with the forms, contact channels and services that are finally published.

sections.heading: User rights
body: Define the real channel for access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability requests.
Review retention policy and possible data sharing before publication.

pendingReviewNote: Pending full legal review before publication.
